title: SQLite open + migrations + DB init store (retryable)

task.description: Create SQLite open/migration runner with explicit `openDb()` and `runMigrations()` (no side effects on import). Add a zustand `dbStore` that runs migrations on demand and exposes blocking error state + `retry()` for UI gating.
acceptance_criteria: Importing `src/lib/db/index.ts` does not run migrations automatically (no DB writes until `runMigrations()` is called)
Calling `runMigrations()` creates `migrations`, `categories`, `habits`, `completion_records` tables and a unique `(habitId,date)` constraint without throwing on a fresh install
`useDbStore.getState().init()` transitions `status` from `idle`→`loading`→`ready` on success, and to `error` with a non-empty `errorMessage` on failure
`retry()` re-invokes `init()` and can reach `ready` after an earlier `error`

definition_of_done: No CRUD functions exist in DB init modules
App compiles after adding store + DB modules
